name: Rogz Dog Bubble Bowl 750ml - Navy Paw Print
description: Built with durability and hygiene in mind, the Rogz Bubble Bowl features a two-in-one design consisting of a removable, non-toxic stainless steel inner bowl fitted inside a decorative melamine outer shell. This setup ensures easy cleaning, improved hygiene, and long-lasting use. The bowl is resistant to stains, UV exposure, and corrosion, making it a reliable choice for daily feeding. To prevent messy spills and sliding, the bowl is fitted with a silicone non-slip base that keeps it securely in place—even during enthusiastic eating sessions. Both layers of the bowl are made from pet-safe, wear-resistant materials, giving pet owners peace of mind while offering pets a sturdy and comfortable feeding experience. Ideal for homes looking to combine style, safety, and practicality, the Rogz Dog Bubble Bowl is an excellent addition to any pet feeding area. Key Features 750ml Capacity: Suitable for medium-sized dogs or for serving both food and water. Two-in-One Construction: Removable stainless steel inner bowl nests inside a decorative melamine outer bowl for maximum hygiene and convenience. High-Quality Materials: Non-toxic stainless steel and durable melamine ensure long-lasting and safe use. Non-Slip Silicone Base: Anti-skid bottom prevents movement and reduces mealtime spills. UV & Corrosion Resistant: Maintains color, strength, and quality even with frequent use and sunlight exposure. Stylish Bubble Design: Eye-catching patterns like Pink Love Print or Navy Paw Print enhance your pet’s feeding space. Easy to Clean: Both components are resistant to stains and corrosion and can be cleaned quickly by hand or in the dishwasher.   Benefits for Pets & Owners Reduces spills and mess thanks to its stable, non-slip base. Made with safe, non-toxic materials to protect your pet’s health. Stylish designs complement home décor and bring a playful touch to feeding areas. Suitable for both food and water, making it a practical choice for busy pet owners
